response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer with a strong background in building scalable microservices, developer tools, and recent AI-agent infrastructure. However, for a Principal-level role focused specifically on Growth and Experimentation Systems, his resume lacks critical domain expertise. There is no evidence of experience building A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, telemetry pipelines, or working with statistical methods and Data Science teams to drive growth strategies. Given the seniority and specialized nature of the position, he is not a strong fit.
strengths: Extensive hands-on engineering experience across a wide variety of languages (TypeScript, Node.js, C++, Java, DLang) and platforms.
Proven ability to architect high-throughput systems, evidenced by microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Relevant recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators).
concerns: No visible experience designing or managing enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing frameworks.
Lacks a demonstrated background in growth engineering, product telemetry, or statistical data analysis.
Missing evidence of leading large, cross-functional initiatives bridging Engineering, Product, and Data Science for business growth.
